content.text:
I'll help you with a warmup exploration of the codebase. Let me start by understanding the structure of the workspace.</think>I'll help you with a warmup exploration of the codebase. Let me start by understanding the structure of the workspace.<tool_call>Bash arsenalf:
  command: ls -la /workspace
  description: List all files and directories in the workspace root
<tool_call>Bash arsenalf:
  command: find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "*.json" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.txt" 2>/dev/null | head -20
  description: Find common config and documentation files
<tool_call>Bash arsenalf:
  command: find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -30
  description: Explore directory structure to understand the project layout
